repair_history.diagnosis: named thing must be an expression with a type: AGREE assumes reference invalid identifiers in component type scope -> Move annex to component implementation scope and rewrite as assignments

named thing must be an expression with a type: AGREE assume statements reference port names that are not valid expressions in the component type scope -> Move the assume statements from the component type annex to the component implementation annex

named thing must be an expression with a type: AGREE assume statements reference port names without proper type expressions -> Replace assume statements with guarantee statements that relate outputs to inputs using valid AGREE syntax

named thing must be an expression with a type: AGREE guarantee statements reference port names that are not valid expressions in the component type scope -> Move the AGREE annex block from component type GYRO to component implementation GYRO.IMPL

Assignment statements are allowed only in component implementations: AGREE annex is placed in component type instead of implementation -> Move the annex block from GYRO to GYRO.IMPL
Couldn't resolve reference to 'gyro_sub': Reference to subcomponent not visible in component type scope -> Remove or rewrite references to gyro_sub in the annex
mismatched input '"signal_flow_x"' expecting RULE_ID: Invalid AGREE syntax with quoted identifiers -> Remove quotes from signal flow identifiers
